mano_cua.result_summary: USACO判题结果界面依赖Firebase后端(localhost:9000)，dev环境后端未运行无法触发判题流程，因此无法在UI中观察到USACO Results的大数字显示效果。mano-cua通过源码分析发现USACOTestCase容器为70x60px，text-sm字体下大数字(如999999KB)可能溢出，但无法在实际UI中验证。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: USACO judging requires Firebase backend which is not running. Agent analyzed source code: USACOTestCase uses w-[70px] h-[60px] container with text-sm for memory/time display. Large numbers could overflow the 70px width but cannot be verified through UI interaction.
